inputs.text: A raw candid video of Elev, a petite young woman with light brown hair and a black headband. She is standing completely unaware, lost in thought with a dazed vacant expression. Focus on her petite stomach and low string thong. Minimal movement, subtle swaying, realistic breathing. Raw grain, harsh store lighting.
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走
